Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Handmaidens of Nakothi]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Of Sea and Shadow ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 23''' — The Handmaidens of Nakothi are creatures described as tapestries of flesh and nightmare.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 25''' — The Handmaiden of Nakothi tore off the roof.}}

== Of Shadow and Sea ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 26''' — Shera killed one of Nakothi's Handmaidens.}}

== Of Darkness and Dawn ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 2''' — Stabbing the Handmaiden of Nakothi caused a surge of power that rendered Shera unconscious.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 2''' — Kerian collapsed the Veil during a battle against Nakothi's Handmaiden.}}

== Of Kings and Killers ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 19''' — Nakothi’s Handmaiden generated destruction that helped Jerri break out of the Gray Island.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 22''' — An Awakened blade cannot slay a Handmaiden of Nakothi.}}

== Of Killers and Kings ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 3''' — Nakothi's dread Handmaidens were devouring the Emperor's daughter's army.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
